title: polystichum remotum
intro: Polystichum remotum, also known as the Chinese lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Polystichum and is native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Polystichum remotum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, Polystichum remotum is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
